{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Naraka brand
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Malachi]] has a [[Naraka brand]] on his right fist.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
